offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 invoices/week, inaccurate labor cost tracking causes budget overruns. We automate weekly labor cost summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and time tracking tools.
problem: Inaccurate labor cost tracking leads to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Participate in community forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for labor hours and project codes
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual process
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
